creator: freebsd@jdc.parodius.com
text:
The below problem has begun as of the most recent
	update to ports/mail/mutt-devel:
	http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/mail/mutt-devel/Makefile#rev1.313

	I do not use any custom WITH/WITHOUT knobs.

icarus# cd /usr/ports/mail/mutt-devel
icarus# make patch
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
=> patch-1.5.21.rr.compressed.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/mutt.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.mutt.org.ua/download/mutt-1.5.21/.

===>  Patching for mutt-devel-1.5.21
===>  Applying distribution patches for mutt-devel-1.5.21
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for mutt-devel-1.5.21
  I can't seem to find a patch in there anywhere.
  I can't seem to find a patch in there anywhere.
^C
